title: Sidecar startup failure diagnostics — structured failure packet + durable boot log
consumer_purpose: When the opencode sidecar process crashes during startup (exit code 1), the desktop app can read a structured failure packet to display in safe mode, even if the parent process IPC was not yet established
claim_atoms: stderr tail; 2. Each of ~6 startup phases is individually guarded with phase-labeled try/catch; 3. Before process.exit(1)
the packet is written to {userDataPath}/sidecar-boot-failure.json; 4. The existing safe mode screen reads and displays this file if present
